2026-04-24T21:16:47.8861083Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/b2bdbc69-f033-418c-8dd0-0fb6c1dab357' before making global git config changes
2026-04-24T21:16:47.8862309Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-04-24T21:16:47.8867928Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/azure-sdk-for-net/azure-sdk-for-net
2026-04-24T21:16:47.8900119Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-04-24T21:16:47.8906768Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-04-24T21:16:47.8938926Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-04-24T21:16:47.9275495Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-04-24T21:16:47.9281118Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-04-24T21:16:47.9317719Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-04-24T21:16:47.9624060Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-04-24T21:16:47.9631470Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-04-24T21:16:47.9665607Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
